The place

Quiet, for a city.

A terrace on the ExpoGeorgia grounds, off Tsereteli Avenue. Old trees, room between the tables, good wine, cool music. Most people walk past the gate without knowing it is here.

The Fire

The oven burns wood. Start with the pizza.

Khachapuri, of course.

The table

The rest of it.

The cheesecake comes up in reviews more than anything else.
